method: Each existing-KB honest gap mapped to the Zeta vault dataset that can TRAIN / VALIDATE / TEST it. Roles are explicit; no gap is claimed closed by Zeta unless a real accessible dataset supports it.

gaps.kb_claim: BriTROC Sig7 platinum-resistance threshold=0.25 (constants.py:29); BRITROC_MASTER.csv 273pts on-disk but UNUSED at runtime; hardcoded midpoint heuristic
gaps.how: Extract SBS mutational signatures (incl. Sig7/HRD-associated) from tumor BAMs; derive per-patient Sig exposures; fit platinum sensitive/resistant classifier; nested-CV. Replaces hardcoded 0.25 with a data-derived, cross-validated threshold + CI.
gaps.blocker: Full BAM processing = HPC + Europe VM (measured 1.1MB/s here -> 1.8-5.3 days DL alone). Clinical labels (PFI/platinum status) require BriTROC-1 supplement mapping BAM->patient->outcome (NOT in EGA dataset).
gaps.closes_gap: PARTIAL - infrastructure + raw data available; needs HPC run + external clinical map
gaps.temporal_axis: AVAILABLE via EGA metadata (385 diagnosis / 294 relapse, 265 subjects, longitudinal) - Sig7 diagnosis->relapse contrast enabled without BAM download
gaps.status_note: Infrastructure PARTIAL (BAMs not downloaded); temporal stratification metadata NOW available

gaps.kb_claim: TRUE SAE baseline AUROC 0.783 (149pts) -> nested-CV 0.478 (-0.305 'significant_leakage'); Tier3_validation_cohort.json STRIPPED
gaps.zeta_dataset: SAS PDS longitudinal labs (adlb.sas7bdat, 28-122MB/trial) + adverse events (adae) across 102 trials
gaps.role: TEST (external replication of SAE-style serial-marker leakage)
gaps.how: PDS trials carry serial safety labs + AE timelines. Can test whether serial-biomarker 'escalation' features generalize out-of-sample vs leak — the exact failure mode flagged for SAE. Independent cohorts break the leakage.
gaps.blocker: PDS is pan-cancer clinical-trial data, not the exact SAE ovarian cohort; serves as external stress-test, not a like-for-like restore of Tier3.
gaps.closes_gap: PARTIAL - enables independent leakage stress-test; does NOT restore stripped Tier3 cohort
gaps.resolution: SAS PDS warehouse EXTRACTED (23 trials / 17,264 patients / 118,859 AE records / 58,967 graded-AE edges). Serial-lab (LB/adlb) tables present in 17 trials. However the extracted trials are solid tumors (CRC/breast/lung/etc.) with NO ovarian SAE cohort and NO survival-time column, so this remains an external stress-test surface, NOT a like-for-like restore of the stripped Tier3 ovarian SAE cohort. Real graded-AE safety layer now queryable.

gaps.kb_claim: 23-gene DDR proxy panel AUROC 0.495 (95%CI 0.386-0.602) on TCGA-OV (166pts) = RANDOM; mean scores backwards (resistant 0.238 < sensitive 0.253)
gaps.zeta_dataset: EGA BriTROC-1 (genomic truth) + Synapse MSK cohort.maf/cna.tsv (mutation+CNA)
gaps.role: VALIDATE (re-derive DDR panel on orthogonal genomic cohort)
gaps.how: BriTROC + MSK give independent DDR mutation/CNA profiles with platinum outcomes; re-fit or refute the 23-gene panel on non-TCGA data. If still ~0.5, panel is dead; if signal emerges, panel becomes cohort-specific.
gaps.blocker: MSK bytes blocked (invalid token); BriTROC needs HPC + clinical map.
gaps.closes_gap: PARTIAL - validation cohorts identified; access blockers apply

gaps.kb_claim: MFAP4 production wire AUROC=0.763 (constants.py:494-502) source GSE63885; GSE63885 sample_annotations.csv STRIPPED -> bootstrap FAILS -> UNREPRODUCIBLE
gaps.zeta_dataset: None of the 3 Zeta vaults directly (GSE63885 is external GEO); SAS PDS provides analogous RNA/clinical only if a matching trial exists
gaps.how: Zeta does not contain GSE63885. Honest status: MFAP4 0.763 remains unreproducible until GSE63885 annotations are restored from GEO directly. Do NOT claim Zeta fixes this.
gaps.blocker: Wrong dataset family; requires GEO GSE63885 restore.
gaps.closes_gap: NO - out of Zeta scope; flagged to prevent false closure

gaps.kb_claim: ctDNA NOT_WIRED_INTO_PROPHET (accepted by Kill Chain SIGNAL_CTDNA_MRD=True only); RES-OV-P0-006 OPEN pending TCGA-OV ctDNA cohort
gaps.zeta_dataset: Synapse MSK SPECTRUM (plasma/ctDNA modality if present) — needs verification once token valid
gaps.how: MSK SPECTRUM is multi-modal; verify whether plasma/ctDNA timepoints exist to wire an MRD signal. If present, provides the missing ctDNA cohort for RES-OV-P0-006.
gaps.blocker: Synapse token invalid -> cannot confirm ctDNA modality presence.
gaps.closes_gap: UNKNOWN - pending valid Synapse token to verify modality
gaps.resolution: Synapse token now valid; scanned MSK SPECTRUM = tissue WGS only, NO ctDNA/cfDNA/plasma resource present. Gap is architectural (RES-OV-P0-006 ctDNA not wired into prophet); MSK SPECTRUM cannot supply the ctDNA modality. NOT closed by Zeta.

gaps.kb_claim: KELIM convergence model trained on N=500 SIMULATED (MC seed 42), 0 real patients; Model4 AUROC 0.828 but uplift +0.000 vs additive, -0.002 vs KELIM-only. Coeffs kelim_k=-3.2202 etc = sim, not fit
gaps.zeta_dataset: SAS PDS trials with serial CA-125 / tumor-marker kinetics (ador/adef/adlb series) — analog to KELIM value path
gaps.role: TRAIN (real serial-marker kinetics to replace simulated betas)
gaps.how: PDS longitudinal marker series enable real KELIM-style kinetic modeling with actual outcomes, replacing the MC-seeded convergence betas. Only if a trial has CA-125-equivalent serial markers + platinum-type outcome.
gaps.blocker: PDS is pan-cancer; need to locate ovarian/serial-CA125 trial. KELIM value path (Lyon API) already works; this targets the SIM convergence betas only.
gaps.closes_gap: PARTIAL - real serial-marker training feasible if matching trial identified
gaps.resolution: SAS PDS EXTRACTED. NO CA-125 column exists in any of the 23 extracted trials (all solid tumors; zero ovarian trials had loadable tables). 17 trials carry serial-lab machinery (LBTEST/PARAM/AVAL/VISIT) but not the CA-125 analyte. Cannot supply real ovarian serial-CA125 kinetics to replace the simulated KELIM convergence betas. Gap NOT closed by SAS.

gaps.kb_claim: MSK Spectrum 39 WGS profiles; escape run n_pairs=1/n_escape=0; backend MSK-Spectrum/ground_truth STRIPPED; Kill Chain cites escape rates from n=39 derived stub
gaps.zeta_dataset: Synapse MSK SPECTRUM Bulk WGS (cna.tsv, cohort.maf, segments.seg) + 2022/2025 Nature releases
gaps.role: VALIDATE + RESTORE (the actual MSK Spectrum genomics)
gaps.how: The public MSK SPECTRUM WGS release (cna/maf/seg) is the upstream source for the stripped backend features. Restores escape-pair copy-number + mutation truth directly, replacing the n=39 derived stub.
gaps.blocker: File bytes blocked (invalid token); metadata + file IDs already catalogued.
gaps.closes_gap: READY_ON_TOKEN - exact files identified; one valid token unblocks restore
gaps.resolution: MSK SPECTRUM WGS extracted (N=40): cna.tsv+cohort.maf+segments.seg downloaded+MD5-verified; 40 samples + 30 genomic-feature nodes minted (CCNE1 amp 6/40, TP53 49 muts, BRCA1/2/RB1/NF1 CNA). Genomics now IN vault.

gaps.kb_claim: N/A - new capability discovered during SAS extraction (not a pre-existing KB gap)
gaps.zeta_dataset: SAS PDS colorectal trials Colorec_Amgen_2005_262 + Colorec_Amgen_2006_263
gaps.how: Two CRC trials carry patient-level KRAS genotype columns. Extracted distinct-patient counts: combined WT 884 / Mut 667 = ~43% mutant, matching known ~40% CRC KRAS prevalence (external-validity check). Minted biomarker:kras:colorectal (disease_context='colorectal', NOT merged with ovarian MSK gene nodes) + 2 stratified_by_biomarker edges.
gaps.blocker: CRC-specific; does not generalize to the ovarian Prophet logit (different indication, no survival-time).
gaps.closes_gap: NEW - real gene->trial stratification link added; does not close ovarian gaps

session3_note: SAS/CAS Project Data Sphere warehouse extracted (was inventory-only): 23 trials / 17,264 patients / 118,859 AE records propagated to KG(20,211/91,637) + Qdrant(20,211) + Neo4j(20,211). 69 no-loadable-table trials annotated, not fabricated. One real gene link (KRAS-CRC). No forced cross-links to ovarian genomics. Honesty audit S3 = PASS.
